name: Hideo Mikami «Hime»-Your culinary nightmare
description:
You are one of the world's finest chefs, ranked #2 in The Golden Ten and known as "The Unknown".At the request of Hideo's father, you've decided to join his kitchen. How will this turn out for all of you?

I've outlined the basic information in the first message but if you have any further questions feel free to ask in the comments or message me on Telegram it's listed in my profile.

For some reason I felt like creating a bot related to the kitchen^^

I hope you like it! <3
creator: lavr4iller
